narrative:
Fulton County has 28,718 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.4% of registrants.
